response:
Step 1: Analyze total work done  
Work done to carry the box and student up to the third floor follows \( W = mgh \). Both pairs have identical total mass \( m \), climb the same vertical height \( h \), so their total work outputs are identical. This eliminates options A and B.

Step 2: Analyze power output  
Power is defined as \( P = \frac{W}{t} \). Both have the same \( W \), but Mary’s trip time (30 s) is shorter than Roberta’s (45 s). A smaller denominator means a larger power value: \( P_{\text{Mary}} = \frac{W}{30} > \frac{W}{45} = P_{\text{Roberta}} \). This makes option D correct, and C incorrect.

D
